key_factors: The aggressor has seized 37.4% of territory within only 7 days, indicating a rapid conventional collapse of the front lines and extreme military pressure. While international support (67.8%) and external protection are high, the internal debate within the small power regarding 'negotiation vs. resistance' suggests emerging cracks in political unity. The speed of territorial loss (Momentum -0.20) is the primary driver of potential government transition or collapse.
